NCT01438840.label: Outcome
NCT01438840.source: Clinical journal of the American Society of Nephrology : CJASN
NCT01438840.text: The estimated mean survival/age of kidney failure for individuals with COL4A definitely pathogenic variants was 58 years (95% confidence interval, 49 to 69), far later than what has been reported in the literature.

NCT00373932.label: Outcome
NCT00373932.text: METHODS: In two parallel trials, 63 splenectomised and 62 non-splenectomised patients with ITP and a mean of three platelet counts 30x10(9)/L or less were randomly assigned 2:1 to subcutaneous injections of romiplostim (n=42 in splenectomised study and n=41 in non-splenectomised study) or placebo (n=21 in both studies) every week for 24 weeks.
